content.en:
The 16 Heaven-level Highnesses in the Heaven-level region basically belong to the Peak-level Highnesses, of which most of them are in the third grade, while there are only two Constant-level Highnesses.

One of the most powerful is a second-grade Henggu-level Highness, and the other party wants to impact the first-grade Henggu-level Highness, so he has not yet impacted the galaxy-level.

Otherwise, there would only be one Constant-level Highness left in the Heaven-level region.

His Royal Highness Qin Chen, whom Ye Tian was familiar with, was not here, and His Highness Qin Chen was no longer at the great god level, but had reached the galaxy level realm.

As for where the other party is now, Ye Tian is not clear.

Although the two knew each other, they did not reach the level of relatives and friends, and Ye Tian naturally did not care about each other's whereabouts.

For the arrival of the 16 heaven-level highnesses, Ye Tian also welcomed and held a banquet.

At the banquet, Ye Tian took out some of his rare treasures, which were very ordinary items for him, but they were extremely precious to these god-level highnesses.

Suddenly, they were amazed by Ye Tian's heroism.

The banquet soon ended, and His Highnesses left laughing and leaving.

From beginning to end, no one dared to provoke Ye Tian.

As Great God-level Highnesses, their authority is already very high, and it is not difficult to investigate Ye Tian's achievements.

They had long known very well that Ye Tian was already a Supreme-level Highness, and he was definitely not an ordinary Supreme-level Highness, his combat power was very rebellious, even if he had become the peak of the ninth order of the Great God level not long ago, he would definitely have the combat power of his first-grade Eternal Ancient Highness.

Therefore, they did not dare to provoke Ye Tian.

But what they never imagined was that when Ye Tian first entered the peak of the Great God Level, he had the combat power of His Royal Highness of the Supreme Level, and he had reached the level of the Son of the Era at both the God level and the True God level.

If they knew, they would be absolutely dumbfounded and completely dumbfounded.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed since the end of the banquet.

Ye Tian was initially familiar with the life in the heaven-level area, and in addition to cultivating every day, he was still cultivating.

As for some opportunities belonging to the heaven-level region, they were of no use to him at all, and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race was also very aware of this, so they never arranged tasks or training with other highnesses.

this day.

The Dark Lord brought a shocking piece of news to Ye Tian.

"Your Highness, the contact of the human race has been blocked, and it is officially in contact with all the races of the universe!"

The Darkness Dominates.

"Is the Immortal Clan's plan completely exposed?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Dark Lord nodded, "Although the Terrans are trying their best to cover up the Immortal Race's plans, but the Terrans are blocking the territory, and the other cosmic races will definitely be suspicious, so they will naturally send a large number of scouts to investigate. We killed some of the scouts, but some of them escaped. Some races such as the Protoss and the Demon Race have long known the secret of our human race transforming the Immortal Race, and not long ago, the Protoss and the Demon Race have completely disclosed this news. For this reason, some of the neighboring cosmic clans have asked our human race to hand over the method of becoming an immortal race. "

"The result?"

Ye Tian asked.

"After a battle, after the Mixed Yuan Supreme and Kunwu Supreme were transformed into immortal clans, their strength increased a lot, and they killed a powerful supreme and five ordinary supremes in one battle, and dealt a severe blow to the prestige of some cosmic clans. But even so, the fact that the human race has become an immortal race has been known by many cosmic clans, and it cannot be concealed. So, the Supremes decided to lift the blockade. It's just that only a small half of the human race has been transformed into an immortal race, and it is still a long way from being completely immortalized, and it will take at least thousands of years. "

The Darkness Dominates.

"But it's enough, the top strength of the human race has been transformed into the immortal race, and now the overall strength of the human race has become much stronger, plus the number of masters and cosmic gods has also increased significantly, and there is enough confidence to face danger. The Lord of Darkness said again.

Ye Tian nodded, agreeing with the statement of the Dark Master.

Moreover, the constant blockade of the territory is also very detrimental to the development of the human race.

The resources of the universe are very abundant, and it is impossible for the human race to always consume resources in the local territory for development, and it is inevitable to seize the resources of other places to make up for its own resource gap.

If you keep blocking it, you won't be eligible to participate in these competitions.

In this way, the resources of the Terrans can only be constantly consumed, and new resources cannot be added.

But after the blockade is lifted, the Terrans can be lifted from the outside world, constantly fighting for new resources, and constantly making the Terrans stronger.

A few more years passed.

Terran Sanctuary, Holy City!

The Holy City is a special city, built in the depths of space, and only the Dominant-level forces, supreme forces, or scattered cultivators above the Cosmic God can enter.

This city can also be called a trading city, and it is also one of the temporary strongholds of the Terran high-level.

Important meetings involving the nine supreme forces and the Terran Supreme Hall will be held here to facilitate the deliberations of the Terran high-level.

this day.

The Kunwu Supreme and many other Supremes came to the Holy City, nine of the twelve Supremes of the Human Race came, and six ordinary Supremes also came, plus some Heavenly Venerables who occupied high positions.

A total of about fifty of the highest Terran figures came to this meeting.

As the meeting was about to begin, one of the most important people of the conference arrived.

Airplanes!

The void was turbulent, and a black-robed man appeared at the meeting wearing a mask.

Many Supremes and Heavenly Venerables knew very well that this black-robed person was the Mixed Yuan Supreme, but it was not the Mixed Yuan Supreme body, but a clone.

As for where the Mixed Yuan Supreme Body is, it is one of the supreme secrets of the human race, and the number of people who know it is no more than a hand, and they have all made an oath not to reveal the place of the Mixed Yuan Supreme's body.

This is also for the sake of the safety of the human race, with the hole card of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, the other universe clans will not dare to really deal with the human race, otherwise they will have to withstand the revenge of the Mixed Yuan Supreme.

"I've seen the Mixed Yuan Supreme!"

"I've seen the Mixed Yuan Supreme!"

"I've seen the Mixed Yuan Supreme!"

A high-ranking Terran said respectfully.

This meeting is also the head of the Mixed Yuan Supreme and is the initiator.

"Everyone, we are all old friends, so I won't say polite words. As for the purpose of the meeting, it should be clear to everyone. At present, there are many foreign enemies of the Terrans, but even if there are many foreign enemies, the development of the Terrans cannot be delayed. Especially when the human race is transforming into an immortal race, the life span has increased greatly, and there are many fewer cases of the descendants of the human race wanting to die in less than a hundred years as before. The lifespan of the Immortals is very long, so the number of humans will increase in the future. If we don't have enough territory to settle these human beings, it will inhibit the development rate of human beings, and even squeeze human resources, so the human race must expand!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme said.

"It really needs to be expanded!" Kunwu Supreme nodded, "At the beginning, we only needed one or two star fields, but now it has grown to thirty-six, but this is far from enough. The Protoss has thousands of star fields, the demons also have thousands of star fields, and some powerful cosmic races also have hundreds of star fields, and our human territory is too small, so we must capture some more star fields. "

"Where the goal is, that's what we're all about!"

Divine Blade Supreme Dao.

Suddenly, they began to tell their opinions one by one-

"At present, in addition to some small races that belong to us, there are several higher races with a larger area, namely the Dragon Clan, the Ten Thousand Beasts Alliance, the Phoenix Clan, the Eight-Clawed Clan, and the Black Armor Clan. There is also a weaker cosmic clan - the ghost clan. I think we should go after a few higher races, so that the price to pay is smaller. "

"Although the higher races are weak, their territory is also small, and even if they defeat a few higher races, it will not be of great help to us humans. Moreover, the higher races do not mean that they lack high-end combat power. For example, the three supremes of the dragon clan are relatively strong, and it takes a certain price to kill them. If it weren't for the fact that the number of dragons was too small and they lacked the cosmic gods and dominating combat power, otherwise, with the potential of the dragon clan, there was also hope to be promoted to a weak cosmic clan. "

"How about the Octopus, this race is not strong, there is only one Supreme, and it is just an ordinary Supreme, although there are many Octopus, they are all relatively weak. It's just that the Octopus Clan also has only one star field, and capturing the next star field is not very helpful to our Terran race!"

......

After a long discussion, there was no unanimous proposal.

Then.

Kunwu Supreme said: "I propose to deal with the ghost clan directly, although the ghost clan is not weak, there are three powerful supremes and eight ordinary supremes, but the weakness of the ghost clan is very obvious, afraid of the power of light and the sun, against the weak attack of the ghost clan, it is enough to occupy the star field of the ghost clan at a small price." "

"There is no sun in the star field of the ghost clan, it is gloomy, and it is not suitable for human habitation!"

An ordinary supreme spoke.

"Transformation!" Kunwu Supreme said: "We can transform the star field of the ghost clan, and with our cultivation, it is not difficult to create some suns, but it will take some time." The Ghost Race has a full ten star fields, and once the 10 star fields are defeated, it is enough to greatly expand the area of our human race. "

"But what kind of reason do we use to attack the ghost clan, if we attack forcibly, it will be easy to be dealt with by other universe clans. "Some Tianzun asked.

Kunwu Supreme was silent for a while, and said: "You can let the ghost clan strike first, so that our human race will have a reason to fight back against the ghost clan for the sake of profit." The other cosmic clans don't want to trouble us. As for how to get the ghost clan to strike first, I have thought of a way for the time being. "

"What's the solution?"

The other Heavenly Venerables and Supremes were a little curious, and even the Mixed Yuan Supremes were also curious.

"I remember that our human race and ghost race have a world called the Netherworld, which is a strange world that only people with great god-level cultivation and below can enter. In the Netherworld, there are many treasures suitable for the ghost clan. If there is a supreme treasure level extreme yin thing inside, do you think the ghost clan will go crazy? Will it vigorously send the great god level into the netherworld? At that time, as long as all the great god level of the ghost clan is killed, the ghost clan will definitely go crazy. "

Kungo Supreme proposed.

stats.label: Stats — Cap. 602
stats.fuerza: 20.000+ poderes de dragón (16.° límite físico roto)
stats.copiedTalents: Cultivo Páramo + Aurora Divino + Sable Estrella Matutina + Sombra Supremo + Curación Supremo + Fuerza Arcano + Defensa Arcano + Formación Supremo + Dominio Fuego Arcano + Camuflaje Pseudo-Arcano + Espacial Pseudo-Arcano (40%) + Ojo Sangre Medio + Barrera Agua Arcano + Espinas Tierra Arcano + Enredadera Arcano + Tormenta Arcano + Lunar Arcano + Hipnosis Supremo + Muerte Suspendida Supremo + Sustitución Muerte Supremo + Transferencia Alma Supremo + Tiempo Alto + Inmortal Supremo + Lanza Trueno Arcano + Hielo Arcano + Necromántico Supremo
